body.title: Fatal crash launches Claude Code via superclaude with error context
body.result: Already implemented: D273 (3d68a1bf) — igor.sh captures stderr, invokes claude auto-fixer on unexpected exit. Ticket predates the implementation.
body.description: Currently: fatal exception → log → sys.exit(1) → igor.sh restarts blindly. Wanted: exit code 2 on bug crash → igor.sh reads last_crash.json → invokes superclaude with traceback + context so CC can fix it. Steps: (1) main.py except block writes structured last_crash.json (ts, exception type, traceback, last_intent), exits code 2. (2) igor.sh: exit_code==2 → call superclaude with crash context. Check ~/TheIgors/superclaude for invocation pattern.
